Device Integration

All listed devices integrate seamlessly with The Tracker App. Your data syncs automatically to your dashboard, enabling comprehensive tracking across:

  • Steps & Distance
  • Heart Rate & HRV
  • Sleep Stages & Quality
  • Workout Detection
  • Calories Burned
  • Recovery Metrics
